discoveries.evidence_summary: AbbVie completed the acquisition of ImmunoGen on February 12, 2024, for approximately $10.1 billion, adding the ovarian cancer treatment ELAHERE to its oncology portfolio.
AbbVie completed its acquisition of Cerevel Therapeutics on August 1, 2024, for approximately $8.7 billion to strengthen its neuroscience pipeline.
AbbVie completed the acquisition of Landos Biopharma on May 23, 2024, for approximately $137.5 million plus contingent value rights, gaining the lead asset NX-13 for autoimmune diseases.
AbbVie announced the acquisition of Celsius Therapeutics on June 27, 2024, for $250 million in cash, acquiring its lead investigational asset CEL383 for inflammatory bowel disease.
